title: Farmer's Cutting: Nature's Spirit
description: Adds Farmer's Delight cutting recipes for Nature's Spirit
body:
Adds more [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) cutting board recipes for [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit)

- Bark, stripping, recycling for all wood types
- More dye from flora that craft into 1 dye

![Wood Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sUhDIDyA/images/8fabed814700ee150bc837d0b880cd3438587897.png) ![Flora Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sUhDIDyA/images/bd3fe7c07587b7c19014b3cd63838f9b69ffc265.png)
